profile.name: Peiyu Liu / 刘沛羽
profile.title: Assistant Professor
profile.affiliation: University of International Business and Economics
profile.tagline: Efficient LLMs, runtime systems, and agentic data intelligence.
profile.bio: I study how large language models can become more efficient and useful by reorganizing parameters, reducing runtime memory cost, and building adaptive agent workflows for real-world data tasks.

directions.name: Parameters
directions.subtitle: Efficient parameter representation and structural adaptation
directions.desc: This line studies how to reduce and reorganize model parameters through decomposition, sharing, masking, and lightweight structural transformation.

directions.name: Runtime
directions.subtitle: KV cache, long-context inference, and memory-aware evaluation
directions.desc: This line focuses on runtime cost, especially memory footprint and latency during long-context prefill and decoding.

directions.name: Agent
directions.subtitle: Dynamic workflows, tool use, and agentic data intelligence
directions.desc: This line treats LLM applications as workflow systems, where the model chooses tools, composes components, and adapts execution paths to each query.

directions.name: Squrve
directions.subtitle: An open-source system for Text-to-SQL research and deployment
directions.desc: Squrve turns the Text-to-SQL research line into reusable components, evaluation workflows, and deployable data-analysis systems.

papers.title: Masks Can be Learned as an Alternative to Experts
papers.detail: Learnable binary masks for sparse expert-like computation.

papers.title: MPOP: Lightweight Fine-tuning for Pre-trained Language Model Compression
papers.detail: Matrix product operator based parameter-efficient adaptation.

papers.title: LiveLongBench: Tackling Long-Context Understanding for Spoken Texts from Live Streams
papers.detail: Spoken long-context benchmark for retrieval and reasoning.

papers.title: FastV-RAG: Fast Visual Retrieval-Augmented Generation
papers.detail: Visual RAG exploration with a small GIF-style demo.

papers.title: KV Cache Compression for Long-context LLM Inference
papers.detail: Reducing KV cache storage while preserving QA performance.

papers.title: Beyond Static Pipelines: Learning Dynamic Workflows for Text-to-SQL
papers.detail: Query-specific Text-to-SQL workflows beyond fixed pipelines.

papers.title: Harness Engineering for LLM-based Agents
papers.detail: Prompts, tools, memory, context, and scaffolds for agents.

papers.title: Squrve: An Open-source Toolkit for Text-to-SQL Workflows
papers.detail: Modular components for SQL generation, evaluation, and refinement.

papers.title: Stronger SQL Generation with Workflow-level Optimization
papers.detail: Robust SQL generation on top of Squrve workflows.

news.text: ICML 2026 regular paper accepted on dynamic workflows for Text-to-SQL.
ACL 2026 Findings paper accepted: LiveLongBench for spoken long-context understanding.
Squrve is being developed as an open-source framework for Text-to-SQL workflows.
